description: Security Test Suite - Comprehensive security specs covering SQL injection, CSRF, XSS, authorization bypass, and input validation across all MigrationSkippr endpoints

userStories.title: Add shared security support files
userStories.description: As a test author, I want shared attack payload constants and a restrictive authorization policy so that all security specs use consistent payloads without duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/support/security_payloads.rb defines SecurityPayloads module with SQL_PAYLOADS, XSS_PAYLOADS, TRAVERSAL_PAYLOADS, and OVERFLOW_PAYLOADS as frozen arrays
spec/security/support/restrictive_policy.rb defines RestrictivePolicy that allows index/show/skip/unskip but denies create/run
Both files are requireable from a spec without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add migrations SQL injection specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that SQL injection payloads in version, note, and database_name parameters cannot execute arbitrary SQL against the migrations endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/migrations/sql_injection_spec.rb tests POST #create, POST #skip, and POST #unskip with all SQL_PAYLOADS
Each test verifies: no 500 response, schema_migrations table still exists, no unexpected rows deleted
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add migrations CSRF specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that POST endpoints on MigrationsController reject requests without valid CSRF tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/migrations/csrf_spec.rb enables allow_forgery_protection and tests POST #create, #skip, #unskip without CSRF tokens
Each test verifies ActionController::InvalidAuthenticityToken is raised
Verifies no state changes (Event count unchanged) when CSRF is rejected
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add migrations XSS specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that XSS payloads stored via note or version fields are HTML-escaped when rendered.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/migrations/xss_spec.rb tests stored XSS via note field, stored XSS via version field, and reflected XSS via flash messages
Each test verifies the raw XSS payload string does not appear unescaped in the response body
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add migrations authorization bypass specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that the deny-all default policy blocks all mutations and the restrictive policy allows only permitted actions.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/migrations/authorization_bypass_spec.rb tests deny-all policy: skip, unskip, and create all raise NotAuthorizedError
Verifies no state changes when authorization is denied (Event count unchanged)
Tests RestrictivePolicy: skip and unskip succeed with redirect, create raises NotAuthorizedError
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add migrations input validation specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that traversal payloads, overflow strings, unicode tricks, and null bytes are handled gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/migrations/input_validation_spec.rb tests POST #create, #skip, #unskip with all TRAVERSAL_PAYLOADS and OVERFLOW_PAYLOADS
Each test verifies response status is not 500
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add databases SQL injection specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that SQL injection payloads in the database :name route parameter cannot execute arbitrary SQL.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/databases/sql_injection_spec.rb tests GET #show with all SQL_PAYLOADS and verifies ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound is raised
Verifies schema_migrations table still exists after each attempt
Tests GET #index does not produce a 500
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add databases CSRF / idempotency specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that GET endpoints on DatabasesController are idempotent and produce no state changes.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/databases/csrf_spec.rb tests GET #index and GET #show called twice each
Verifies Event count is unchanged and response is 200 OK
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add databases XSS specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that XSS payloads in flash messages and database name parameters are escaped or rejected.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/databases/xss_spec.rb tests flash notice/alert XSS on #show and #index
Tests XSS payloads as database name parameter — expects ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add databases authorization bypass specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that the deny-all policy blocks index and show, and the restrictive policy allows them.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/databases/authorization_bypass_spec.rb tests deny-all: index and show raise NotAuthorizedError
Tests RestrictivePolicy: index and show return 200 OK
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add databases input validation specs
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want proof that traversal and overflow payloads as database names are rejected.
acceptanceCriteria: spec/security/databases/input_validation_spec.rb tests GET #show with all TRAVERSAL_PAYLOADS and OVERFLOW_PAYLOADS
Each test verifies ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound is raised
All examples pass green
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Rake tasks for security and mutation tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Rake tasks to run security specs and mutation tests independently.
acceptanceCriteria: mutant-rspec and mutant-license gems added to Gemfile (development/test group)
.mutant.yml targets Skipper, Runner, DatabaseResolver, MigrationsController, DatabasesController
bundle exec rake spec:security runs only spec/security/**/*_spec.rb
bundle exec rake mutant:security runs mutation tests against security-critical classes
bundle exec rake -T lists both tasks
If Mutant license is unavailable, the task fails gracefully (not a blocker)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add CI pipeline integration for security tests
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want security specs to run on every push and mutation tests to run on PRs.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/ci.yml has a security-test job that runs bundle exec rake spec:security on every push
.github/workflows/ci.yml has a mutation-test job that runs bundle exec rake mutant:security only on PRs
security-test job depends on lint (same as existing test job)
mutation-test job depends on security-test
CI YAML is valid (parseable by Ruby's YAML library)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Full suite verification
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want to verify that the complete security suite passes and the existing test suite has no regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: bundle exec rake spec:security passes all examples
bundle exec rspec passes all examples (existing + security)
No reduction in code coverage
